title: v0.2.0 stories (SDK-S1..S13) shipped 2026-04-01
note: 119 unit + 13 integration tests green. HITL removed, API aligned.

title: Demo app stories archived
note: Demo app archived 2026-04-04 (commit 958541f). Prior tracker entries moved to .plans/ARCHIVE/tracker-demo-app.jsonl.

title: v0.3.0 Phase 2-7 incremental approach superseded
note: Replaced by spec-driven rewrite (2026-04-06). Old phase specs/stories no longer applicable.

title: v0.3.0 Spec-Driven SDK Rewrite
note: All 9 endpoints implemented. 99 unit tests, all gates green. Branch: feature/v0.3.0-sdk-spec-rewrite

title: Foundational Types (models, errors, crypto, scope)
note: Commit cfda743. 46 unit tests.

title: Transport + App Container
note: Commit cfda743. _transport.py with RFC 7807, app.py with lazy auth.

title: Agent Lifecycle (TDD: renew, release, delegate)
note: Commit d252846. 15 tests written first, then implemented.

title: App + Validate Tests
note: Commits 90463be, 55caa68. 17 app tests + 7 validate tests.

title: Integration Tests Against Live Broker
note: 16/22 tests passing. 6 have test coding errors (scope format mismatches). Evidence files enhanced with detailed scope info.

title: Payment API: Lazy Authentication
note: test_payment_api_lazy_auth - Credentials created only on first transaction.

title: Email Batch: Multiple Agents
note: test_email_batch_multiple_agents - One agent per email, scope isolation.

title: Microservice: Validation Before Call
note: test_microservice_validation_before_call - Pre-flight token validation.

title: Analytics App: Scope Ceiling Blocked
note: test_analytics_app_scope_ceiling - Broker rejects out-of-bounds scope.

title: Data Export: Token Renewal
note: test_data_export_token_renewal - Long job renews token mid-execution.

title: API Request: Scoped Cleanup
note: test_api_request_scoped_cleanup - Agent released after HTTP request.

title: Data Pipeline: Scope-Attenuated Delegation
note: test_pipeline_delegation - Orchestrator delegates narrower scope.

title: Stream Processor: Continuous Validation
note: test_continuous_validation_loop - Validate before each batch.

title: LLM Agent: Tool Gating
note: test_llm_tool_gating - Scope check before every tool execution.

title: RFC 7807 Problem Detail Parsing
note: test_rfc7807_error_parsing - Structured error responses.

title: Complete End-to-End Workflow
note: test_complete_e2e_workflow - Full lifecycle demonstration.

title: Multi-Hop Request Chain
note: test_multi_hop_request_chain - Gateway → Service A → Service B.

title: Scoped Cache Access Pattern
note: test_scoped_cache_access - Separate read-only and write-only agents.

title: Webhook: Per-Tenant Scope
note: test_webhook_per_tenant_scope - Each tenant isolated.

title: Scheduled Job: Periodic Validation
note: test_scheduled_job_periodic_validation - Cron job validates before each run.

title: Scope Ceiling: Hard Limit Enforcement
note: test_scope_ceiling_hard_limit - Prompt injection cannot escape ceiling.

title: Prompt Injection: Tool Escalation Blocked
note: test_prompt_injection_tool_blocked - LLM tries different tool, blocked by scope.

title: Multi-Turn: Scope Persistence
note: test_multi_turn_scope_persistent - Chat session scope never expands.

title: Delegation: Attenuation Subset Only
note: test_delegation_attenuation_subset_only - Can only delegate narrower scope.

title: Validate-First: Every Tool Call
note: test_validate_first_every_call - Zero trust, validate before EVERY call.

title: Delegation: Escalation Blocked
note: test_delegation_escalation_blocked - Cannot delegate broader or different scope.

title: Multi-Scope: Selective Handoff
note: test_multi_scope_selective_delegation - Delegate only one of multiple scopes.
